mapper.select: SELECT t.peer_id AS peerId, cm.content AS lastMessage, cm.create_time AS lastTime FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN from_user_id = #{userId} THEN to_user_id ELSE from_user_id END AS peer_id, MAX(id) AS last_id FROM chat_message WHERE from_user_id = #{userId} OR to_user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY peer_id ) t JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.id = t.last_id ORDER BY cm.create_time DESC, cm.id DESC
SELECT from_user_id AS peerId, COUNT(*) AS unreadCount FROM chat_message WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY from_user_id

SELECT id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content, is_read, job_id, job_key, create_time FROM chat_message WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId} AND to_user_id = #{peerId}) OR (from_user_id = #{peerId} AND to_user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND from_user_id = #{peerId} AND is_read = 0
